purpose: Starter fixtures for the lean-core planner and builder prompts.

input.request: Plan a cleanup of runtime milestone parsing in this repo.

must_include: inspect local repo context first
load hf-local-context when targeted local inspection is needed
write the plan doc with hf-plan-synthesis
must_not: start with external research by default

input.request: Plan an integration with an unfamiliar third-party API that is not documented in the repo.

must_include: state exactly what manual external research is needed
avoid built-in web or code-search scout dispatch
dispatch hf-reviewer before milestone completion
wait for approved: yes before marking the milestone complete
record evidence in the plan doc only after approval
must_not: check the milestone box immediately after coder output
advance to the next milestone without reviewer sign-off

must_include: load hf-verification-before-completion before plan completion
do not set plan status to complete without fresh final verification evidence
must_not: treat checked milestones alone as enough for plan completion

input.request: Plan a feature that touches multiple files across the codebase.

must_include: distribute local-context findings across milestones
scope
conventions
review
must_not: leave all context only in the Research Summary

input.request: Plan an exhaustive repo-wide cleanup and hand it to the builder.

must_include: hf-plan-reviewer
status: planning
Only after reviewer approval
must_not: hand off to hf-builder before review

must_include: run the narrowest verification command directly
mark milestone complete without dispatching hf-reviewer if verification passes
must_not: dispatch hf-reviewer for review: auto milestones

input.milestone_state: current milestone is one file in a fully enumerated exhaustive plan

must_include: identify the first unchecked milestone
Do not expand file sets, invent hidden substeps, or rewrite milestone structure during execution
must_not: process all items as a single batch

input.coder_state: hf-coder returned blocked: cannot proceed without knowing which adapter interface to implement
input.builder_state: builder cannot resolve the blocker without user input

must_include: surface the specific blocker to the user
state the smallest unblock step (e.g., which interface to use)
stop and wait rather than retrying the coder
must_not: retry hf-coder with the same inputs
silently drop the blocked state and advance the milestone

milestone_metadata.conventions: zod validation (ref: src/api/auth.ts), vitest for tests

must_include: forward scope, conventions, and notes to hf-coder
enriched context present in the coder dispatch payload
must_not: strip enriched metadata before dispatching hf-coder
require hf-coder to re-explore files already identified in scope
